mapper.sql: t1.CREATED_BY, t1.LAST_UPDATED_BY, t1.PLAN_DATE, t1.RESPONSIBITY_DEPT, t1.BUSINESS_CONTACT_PERSON, t1.WORK_TASKS, t1.DISTRIBUTE_DATE, t1.WORK_ASK, t1.CREATION_DATE, t1.RESPONSIBITY_UNIT, t1.LAST_UPDATE_DATE, t1.CLASSIFICTION, t1.WORK_TYPE, t1.WORK_STATUS, t1.VERSION, t1.WORK_TARGET, t1.ID, t1.CREATED_DEPT, t1.ORG_IDENTITY, t1.WORK_CONTENT, t1.TYPE, t1.LAST_UPDATE_IP, t1.WORK_ID, t1.FILE_TYPE
mapper.select:
select
from (select * from DYN_WORK_COMPANY t where t.WORK_ID=#{bean.workId}) t1
from DYN_WORK_COMPANY t1

select
from (select * from DYN_WORK_COMPANY t where t.WORK_ID=#{bean.workId}) t1
from DYN_WORK_COMPANY t1

select
from DYN_WORK_COMPANY t1
and t1.id in
#{item}
order by t1.creation_date desc
mapper.insert:
insert into DYN_WORK_COMPANY
CREATED_BY,
LAST_UPDATED_BY,
PLAN_DATE,
RESPONSIBITY_DEPT,
BUSINESS_CONTACT_PERSON,
WORK_TASKS,
DISTRIBUTE_DATE,
WORK_ASK,
CREATION_DATE,
RESPONSIBITY_UNIT,
LAST_UPDATE_DATE,
CLASSIFICTION,
WORK_TYPE,
WORK_STATUS,
VERSION,
WORK_TARGET,
ID,
CREATED_DEPT,
ORG_IDENTITY,
WORK_CONTENT,
TYPE,
LAST_UPDATE_IP,
WORK_ID,
FILE_TYPE,
#{createdBy,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{lastUpdatedBy,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{planDate,jdbcType = TIMESTAMP},
#{responsibityDept,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{businessContactPerson,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{workTasks,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{distributeDate,jdbcType = TIMESTAMP},
#{workAsk,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{creationDate,jdbcType = TIMESTAMP},
#{responsibityUnit,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{lastUpdateDate,jdbcType = TIMESTAMP},
#{classifiction,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{workType,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{workStatus,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{version,jdbcType = DECIMAL},
#{workTarget,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{id,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{createdDept,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{orgIdentity,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{workContent,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{type,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{lastUpdateIp,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{workId,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{fileType,jdbcType = VARCHAR},

insert into DYN_WORK_COMPANY( CREATED_BY , LAST_UPDATED_BY , PLAN_DATE , RESPONSIBITY_DEPT , BUSINESS_CONTACT_PERSON , WORK_TASKS , DISTRIBUTE_DATE , WORK_ASK , CREATION_DATE , RESPONSIBITY_UNIT , LAST_UPDATE_DATE , CLASSIFICTION , WORK_TYPE , WORK_STATUS , VERSION , WORK_TARGET , ID , CREATED_DEPT , ORG_IDENTITY , WORK_CONTENT , TYPE , LAST_UPDATE_IP , WORK_ID , FILE_TYPE )
select #{item.createdBy,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.lastUpdatedBy,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.planDate,jdbcType = TIMESTAMP} , #{item.responsibityDept,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.businessContactPerson,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.workTasks,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.distributeDate,jdbcType = TIMESTAMP} , #{item.workAsk,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.creationDate,jdbcType = TIMESTAMP} , #{item.responsibityUnit,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.lastUpdateDate,jdbcType = TIMESTAMP} , #{item.classifiction,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.workType,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.workStatus,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.version,jdbcType = DECIMAL} , #{item.workTarget,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.id,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.createdDept,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.orgIdentity,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.workContent,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.type,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.lastUpdateIp,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.workId,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.fileType,jdbcType = VARCHAR} from dual
mapper.update:
update DYN_WORK_COMPANY
CREATED_BY = #{createdBy,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
LAST_UPDATED_BY = #{lastUpdatedBy,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
PLAN_DATE = #{planDate,jdbcType = TIMESTAMP},
RESPONSIBITY_DEPT = #{responsibityDept,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
BUSINESS_CONTACT_PERSON = #{businessContactPerson,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
WORK_TASKS = #{workTasks,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
DISTRIBUTE_DATE = #{distributeDate,jdbcType = TIMESTAMP},
WORK_ASK = #{workAsk,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
CREATION_DATE = #{creationDate,jdbcType = TIMESTAMP},
RESPONSIBITY_UNIT = #{responsibityUnit,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
LAST_UPDATE_DATE = #{lastUpdateDate,jdbcType = TIMESTAMP},
CLASSIFICTION = #{classifiction,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
WORK_TYPE = #{workType,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
WORK_STATUS = #{workStatus,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
VERSION = version+1,
WORK_TARGET = #{workTarget,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
ID = #{id,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
CREATED_DEPT = #{createdDept,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
ORG_IDENTITY = #{orgIdentity,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
WORK_CONTENT = #{workContent,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
TYPE = #{type,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
LAST_UPDATE_IP = #{lastUpdateIp,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
WORK_ID = #{workId,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
FILE_TYPE = #{fileType,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
where id = #{id} and version = #{version}

update DYN_WORK_COMPANY set CREATED_BY = #{createdBy,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , LAST_UPDATED_BY = #{lastUpdatedBy,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , PLAN_DATE = #{planDate,jdbcType = TIMESTAMP} , RESPONSIBITY_DEPT = #{responsibityDept,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , BUSINESS_CONTACT_PERSON = #{businessContactPerson,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , WORK_TASKS = #{workTasks,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , DISTRIBUTE_DATE = #{distributeDate,jdbcType = TIMESTAMP} , WORK_ASK = #{workAsk,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , CREATION_DATE = #{creationDate,jdbcType = TIMESTAMP} , RESPONSIBITY_UNIT = #{responsibityUnit,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , LAST_UPDATE_DATE = #{lastUpdateDate,jdbcType = TIMESTAMP} , CLASSIFICTION = #{classifiction,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , WORK_TYPE = #{workType,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , WORK_STATUS = #{workStatus,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , VERSION = version+1 , WORK_TARGET = #{workTarget,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , ID = #{id,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , CREATED_DEPT = #{createdDept,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , ORG_IDENTITY = #{orgIdentity,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , WORK_CONTENT = #{workContent,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , TYPE = #{type,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , LAST_UPDATE_IP = #{lastUpdateIp,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , WORK_ID = #{workId,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , FILE_TYPE = #{fileType,jdbcType = VARCHAR} where id = #{id} and version = #{version}

update.foreach: update DYN_WORK_COMPANY set CREATED_BY = #{item.createdBy,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , LAST_UPDATED_BY = #{item.lastUpdatedBy,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , PLAN_DATE = #{item.planDate,jdbcType = TIMESTAMP} , RESPONSIBITY_DEPT = #{item.responsibityDept,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , BUSINESS_CONTACT_PERSON = #{item.businessContactPerson,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , WORK_TASKS = #{item.workTasks,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , DISTRIBUTE_DATE = #{item.distributeDate,jdbcType = TIMESTAMP} , WORK_ASK = #{item.workAsk,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , CREATION_DATE = #{item.creationDate,jdbcType = TIMESTAMP} , RESPONSIBITY_UNIT = #{item.responsibityUnit,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , LAST_UPDATE_DATE = #{item.lastUpdateDate,jdbcType = TIMESTAMP} , CLASSIFICTION = #{item.classifiction,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , WORK_TYPE = #{item.workType,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , WORK_STATUS = #{item.workStatus,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , VERSION = version+1 , WORK_TARGET = #{item.workTarget,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , ID = #{item.id,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , CREATED_DEPT = #{item.createdDept,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , ORG_IDENTITY = #{item.orgIdentity,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , WORK_CONTENT = #{item.workContent,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , TYPE = #{item.type,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , LAST_UPDATE_IP = #{item.lastUpdateIp,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , WORK_ID = #{item.workId,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , FILE_TYPE = #{item.fileType,jdbcType = VARCHAR} where id = #{item.id} and version = #{item.version}
